languages.text: "Если некая персона ведет себя подозрительно и имеет дела с неблагонадежными личностями, ее надлежит подвергнуть дознанию. Статус здесь принимается во внимание, но не дает иммунитета. Особенно в условиях военного положения. Итак, что за договор связывает вас с сержантом Вукчиком?" {n}Капитан безукоризненно вежлив, но явно намерен продолжить допрос.{/n}

"If someone is behaving suspiciously and having dealings with ne'er-do-wells, then they should be questioned. Status carries some weight in the matter, but it doesn't grant immunity. Especially under martial law. So, now, what's the connection between you and Sergeant Vukchik?" {n}The captain is unfailingly courteous, but he is clearly intent on continuing his interrogation.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Если некая персона ведет себя подозрительно и имеет дела с неблагонадежными личностями, ее надлежит подвергнуть дознанию. Статус здесь принимается во внимание, но не дает иммунитета. Особенно в условиях военного положения. Итак, что за договор связывает вас с сержантом Вукчиком?" {n}Капитан безукоризненно вежлив, но явно намерен продолжить допрос.{/n}

Especially under martial law. So, now, what's the connection between you and Sergeant Vukchik?" {n}The captain is unfailingly courteous, but he is clearly intent on continuing his interrogation.{/n}

languages.text: «Si alguien se comporta de forma sospechosa y trata con maleantes, es normal interrogarle. La posición social influye en esto, pero no otorga inmunidad. Especialmente bajo ley marcial. Hable: ¿qué relación tiene con el sargento Vukchik?». {n}El capitán es perfectamente cortés, pero tiene intención de continuar con el interrogatorio.{/n}
languages.original_text: "If someone is behaving suspiciously and having dealings with ne'er-do-wells, then they should be questioned. Status carries some weight in the matter, but it doesn't grant immunity. Especially under martial law. So, now, what's the connection between you and Sergeant Vukchik?" {n}The captain is unfailingly courteous, but he is clearly intent on continuing his interrogation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Si alguien se comporta de forma sospechosa y trata con maleantes, es normal interrogarle. La posición social influye en esto, pero no otorga inmunidad. Especialmente bajo ley marcial. Hable: ¿qué relación tiene con el sargento Vukchik?». {n}El capitán es perfectamente cortés, pero tiene intención de continuar con el interrogatorio.{/n}

languages.text: “如果有人行迹可疑，还跟游手好闲之徒来往，那他们就理应被盘问。身份地位或许有分量，但它不等于豁免权，尤其是在戒严期间。所以，您和武克奇克军士到底有什么关系？”{n}上尉始终彬彬有礼，但显然是执意要继续审问。{/n}
languages.original_text: "If someone is behaving suspiciously and having dealings with ne'er-do-wells, then they should be questioned. Status carries some weight in the matter, but it doesn't grant immunity. Especially under martial law. So, now, what's the connection between you and Sergeant Vukchik?" {n}The captain is unfailingly courteous, but he is clearly intent on continuing his interrogation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “如果有人行迹可疑，还跟游手好闲之徒来往，那他们就理应被盘问。身份地位或许有分量，但它不等于豁免权，尤其是在戒严期间。所以，您和武克奇克军士到底有什么关系？”{n}上尉始终彬彬有礼，但显然是执意要继续审问。{/n}

languages.text: « Quiconque se comporte de façon suspecte et fricote avec des bons à rien doit être interrogé. S'il est vrai que le statut a une certaine importance en la matière, il ne garantit pas pour autant l'immunité. En particulier sous la loi martiale. Alors, dites-moi, quels sont vos liens avec le sergent Vukchik ? » {n}Si le capitaine ne se départ pas de sa courtoisie habituelle, il est visiblement déterminé à mener son interrogatoire jusqu'au bout.{/n}
languages.original_text: "If someone is behaving suspiciously and having dealings with ne'er-do-wells, then they should be questioned. Status carries some weight in the matter, but it doesn't grant immunity. Especially under martial law. So, now, what's the connection between you and Sergeant Vukchik?" {n}The captain is unfailingly courteous, but he is clearly intent on continuing his interrogation.{/n}

Alors, dites-moi, quels sont vos liens avec le sergent Vukchik ? » {n}Si le capitaine ne se départ pas de sa courtoisie habituelle, il est visiblement déterminé à mener son interrogatoire jusqu'au bout.{/n}

languages.text: "Birisi şüpheli davranıyor ve işe yaramaz serserilerle iş çeviriyorsa sorgulanmalıdır. Statü, bu konularda biraz ağırlık taşır ama dokunulmazlık vermez. Özellikle de sıkıyönetim altındayken. Şimdi... Çavuş Vukchik'le aranızda ne tür bir bağlantı var?" {n}Yüzbaşı, son derece nazik davransa da sorgusuna devam etmeye kararlı olduğu belli oluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "If someone is behaving suspiciously and having dealings with ne'er-do-wells, then they should be questioned. Status carries some weight in the matter, but it doesn't grant immunity. Especially under martial law. So, now, what's the connection between you and Sergeant Vukchik?" {n}The captain is unfailingly courteous, but he is clearly intent on continuing his interrogation.{/n}

Özellikle de sıkıyönetim altındayken. Şimdi... Çavuş Vukchik'le aranızda ne tür bir bağlantı var?" {n}Yüzbaşı, son derece nazik davransa da sorgusuna devam etmeye kararlı olduğu belli oluyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Wer sich verdächtig verhält und mit Nichtsnutzen einlässt, sollte befragt werden. Der Status der Person hat in dieser Frage ein gewisses Gewicht, gewährt aber keine Immunität. Schon gar nicht unter Kriegsrecht. Also, welche Verbindung besteht zwischen Euch und Sergeant Vukchik?" {n}Der Captain ist stets höflich, aber entschlossen, seine Befragung fortzusetzen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "If someone is behaving suspiciously and having dealings with ne'er-do-wells, then they should be questioned. Status carries some weight in the matter, but it doesn't grant immunity. Especially under martial law. So, now, what's the connection between you and Sergeant Vukchik?" {n}The captain is unfailingly courteous, but he is clearly intent on continuing his interrogation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Wer sich verdächtig verhält und mit Nichtsnutzen einlässt, sollte befragt werden. Der Status der Person hat in dieser Frage ein gewisses Gewicht, gewährt aber keine Immunität. Schon gar nicht unter Kriegsrecht. Also, welche Verbindung besteht zwischen Euch und Sergeant Vukchik?" {n}Der Captain ist stets höflich, aber entschlossen, seine Befragung fortzusetzen.{/n}

languages.text: 「怪しい行動をとって、悪党と取引をしているのなら、尋問するべきだ。身分は多少考慮されるが、免責にはならない。特に戒厳令下では。では、あなたとヴチキ大尉との関係は？」{n}艦長は常に礼儀正しく、しかし、尋問を続ける意向は明らかである。{/n}
